name: Vaishakh Nambiar
intro: I build and scale high-performance financial products that combine seamless user experiences with modern data architecture. Leveraging enterprise experience at American Express and with Suncorp Australia, I specialize in transforming fragmented core-banking data into highly commercial digital products, cloud-native layers, and intelligent AI-driven automation.
introHtml: I build and scale high-performance financial products that combine seamless user experiences with modern data architecture. Leveraging enterprise experience at American Express and with Suncorp Australia, I specialize in transforming fragmented core-banking data into highly commercial digital products, cloud-native layers, and efficient, high-impact AI-driven automation.
